message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor "Team Member" as TM
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as UI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as C
participant ":DataManagement" as DM
participant "projectStore : ProjectStore" as PS
participant "project : Project" as P

TM -> UI : 1 Starts the Task creation in User Story
UI --> TM : 2 request the project code
TM -> UI : 3 Inserts the project code
UI --> TM : 4 request sprint id
TM -> UI : 5 Inserts the sprint id
UI --> TM : 6 request user story id
TM -> UI : 7 Inserts the user story id
UI --> TM : 8 request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
TM -> UI : 9 Inserts request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate

UI -> C : 10 createTaskInUserStory(code, sprintID, userStoryID, name, description, type, startDate, endDate)

C -> DM : 11 projectStore = getProjectStore()
DM --> C : 12 projectStore

C -> PS : 13 project = getProjectByCode(code)
PS --> C : 14 project

C -> P : 15 getSprintByID(sprintID)

ref over P
TaskCreationInUserStory
end ref

P --> C : 16 true
C --> UI : 17 true
UI --> TM : 18 Task created successfully
@enduml
